mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dietary_advice (patient_id, meal_date, meal_type, food_content, nutrition_notes) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{mealDate}, #{mealType}, #{foodContent}, #{nutritionNotes})
mapper.update: UPDATE dietary_advice SET patient_id = #{patientId}, meal_date = #{mealDate}, meal_type = #{mealType}, food_content = #{foodContent}, nutrition_notes = #{nutritionNotes} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_id, meal_date, meal_type, food_content, nutrition_notes, created_at FROM dietary_advice ORDER BY meal_date DESC, id
